name: Sa Sa International Holdings Limited
summary: Sa Sa International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail and wholesale of cosmetic products in Hong Kong and Macau, Mainland China, and Malaysia. The company offers approximately 700 brands of skincare, fragrance, make-up, body care, hair care, and health and beauty supplements. It is also involved in intellectual property rights and property holding activities, as well as trading of cosmetic and skin care products. As of June 30, 2020, the company's retail network consisted of 231 stores. It also sells its products through e-commerce platforms, including as sasa.com, mobile app, WeChat mini-programme, and third-party platforms. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Chai Wan, Hong Kong.
